# WebNest - Premier Web Design & Development Company in Durgapur, West Bengal

> WebNest delivers elite responsive website design, custom full-stack web development, and search engine optimization (SEO) services tailored for local enterprises and global businesses.

## Key Capabilities & Focus Area Services

### Custom Website Design & UI/UX Engine
- **Custom Website Design**: Tailored visual brand strategy, high-fidelity prototypes, and typography specification.
- **Responsive Website Design**: Fluid layout matrix rendering beautifully across mobile touch targets, tablets, and wide screens.
- **Professional Web Designer**: Creative visual directors configuring premium typography pairing and customized CSS grids.

### Advanced Web Development Services
- **Website Development Services**: Ultra-fast static rendering and high-performance server-side layouts.
- **Business Website Development**: Formulating solid enterprise portals, dispatch dashboards, and digital workflows.
- **Ecommerce Website Development**: Modular inventory synchronization, predictive catalogs, and secure Stripe payment hooks.

### Organic Search Engine Optimization & Growth
- **SEO Services**: Core Web Vitals optimization, custom schema insertion, and semantic HTML5 structures.
- **Local SEO Services**: Regional targeting of local search parameters to maximize high-intent organic clicks.
- **Technical SEO Services**: Reducing Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) and ensuring rapid Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) speeds.

---

## Service Regions (West Bengal, India)
- **Local Hub (Durgapur)**: B-Zone, City Centre, Benachity, and surrounding areas.
- **Kolkata & Asansol**: Support pipelines for digital e-commerce suites and heavy machinery coordination logs.
- **Burdwan, Haldia, & Siliguri**: Agro-marketplaces, travel aggregators, and secure booking triggers.

---

## Technology Stack & Architectural Integrity
- **Frontend Engine**: React, next-gen TypeScript modules, custom Motion-guided responsive layouts.
- **Styling Architecture**: Tailwind CSS framework for supercharged responsive styling without embedded/bloated style sheets.
- **Backend Architecture**: Secure Node.js / Express servers with integrated secure custom schema routing proxies.
- **AI Consultation**: Google Gemini 3.5 API integrated server-side with customized context tuning for automated assistant lead acquisition.

---

## Contact Information
- **Support Desk Email**: webnestsupport@gmail.com
- **HQ Office Address**: 2/32 Bankim Chandra Avenue, B-Zone, Durgapur, West Bengal, Pin 713205, India
